explanation: This command simulates a web server process (caddy.exe) spawning a suspicious child process (rundll32.exe with comsvcs.dll), which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. The command uses minimal mutation techniques (insertion of flag) to maintain functionality while testing detection.
